subject: refactor(ui): unify cell and section control color scheme in LayoutTab
body:
Both panels now use text-primary consistently — labels already
describe the hierarchy (Cell vs Row/Column), so color differentiation
was redundant. Removes unused btnSecondary and btnSecondaryDisabled
constants.

Tags: ui, layout, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: structure-tab
Semver: patch
